description_long: This object is a classic hand grenade with an oval, segmented metal body, painted in a matte black finish. The top features a prominent safety lever and a visible safety pin mechanism, both rendered in a slightly worn, metallic texture. A circular, copper-colored marking or label is present on the front, adding a distinct visual cue. The body is ribbed for grip, and the overall construction suggests a robust, heavy-duty design typical of military ordnance. The rear view shows the lever extending down the back, with a rectangular plate or marking. No visible wires or digital components are present, and the object appears solid and compact.
description: A matte black, oval hand grenade with a ribbed metal body, safety lever, and a copper-colored front marking. The design is robust and typical of military explosives.
description_view_0: Front view shows the oval, ribbed body with a copper-colored circular marking and the top-mounted safety lever and pin.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the grenade's curved profile and the protruding safety lever mechanism.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the full length of the safety lever and a rectangular marking on the lever.
description_view_3: Opposite side view shows the rounded body and the safety pin assembly from a different angle.
attribute_detonation_mechanism: Detonation is likely initiated by pulling the safety pin and releasing the safety lever, which would trigger an internal fuse.
